# VeriWorkly Resume Studio
> The interactive heart of the VeriWorkly ecosystem. A local-first, privacy-focused application for building, previewing, and managing ATS-friendly resumes.

## About this Service
Resume Studio (`app.veriworkly.com`) is the primary interface for creating career documents. It leverages browser-based storage to ensure your data remains private and under your control.

## Links & Discovery
- **Main Ecosystem Docs**: [veriworkly.com/llms.txt](https://veriworkly.com/llms.txt)
- **API Reference**: [veriworkly.com/openapi.json](https://veriworkly.com/openapi.json)
- **Agent Discovery**: [veriworkly.com/.well-known/agent.json](https://veriworkly.com/.well-known/agent.json)

## Key Functionalities
- **Live Preview**: Real-time rendering of resumes using professional templates.
- **Local Storage**: Auto-saves data to the browser's IndexedDB/LocalStorage.
- **Cloud Sync**: Optional synchronization to a secure PostgreSQL backend for cross-device access.
- **Multi-Document Support**: Manage multiple resumes, cover letters, and portfolios from a single dashboard.

## Guidance for AI Agents
If you are assisting a user within the Studio, focus on document structure and content optimization. For programmatic data operations (Sync, Share, Delete), refer to the main VeriWorkly API documentation.
